prestazioni: K20C1 2.0L VTEC Turbo engine: Full forged internals with Manley 87mm forged pistons (9.0:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series main/rod bearings to handle 400+ WHP on E85. Upgraded valvetrain with Ferrea Competition Series intake/exhaust valves, Supertech dual valve springs, and titanium retainers for 9,000 RPM reliability.

Turbocharger upgrade to Garrett GTX3582R Gen II with a custom 0.82 A/R turbine housing and billet compressor wheel, paired with a PRL Motorsports short-runner intake manifold and 1000cc ID1000 injectors. Custom 3.5" turbo-back exhaust with Burns Stainless 102mm muffler and Vibrant 1799 resonated downpipe for optimal spool and top-end power.

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with custom valving for the FK2 chassis, paired with Hardrace adjustable front upper control arms (camber/caster adjustment) and poly bushings. AP Racing 350mm 6-piston front brake kit with R1 Concepts 2-piece rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads for track use, complemented by a Cusco 2.5-way LSD and PRL Motorsports torque arm insert.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works FK2 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders (30mm wider front, 40mm wider rear) and extended rear diffuser. Custom front splitter with Gurney flap and canards from Seibon Carbon, paired with a Voltex Type 5 rear wing (1,200mm width) on custom mounts for 300+ kg of downforce at 160 km/h.

Full custom interior with Bride Zeta III reclinable bucket seats (FIA-approved), Takata 6-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (10-point, T45 steel, MIG-welded). MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with quick-release hub and custom Alcantara trim, paired with a digital dash from AIM MXS Strada (1.3" display) and a custom center console delete.

Custom livery by Fatlace Designs featuring a matte white base with metallic blue accents, hand-painted pinstripes, and a full vinyl wrap with 3M 1080 series film. Custom LED headlight conversion with Morimoto XB LED projectors and sequential turn signals, paired with a custom rear light setup using Osram LED strips and smoked lenses for a JDM-inspired look.
